lines: Music is the heartbeat of our world.
You have a song in your step today, {player}!
no_quest_line: You have a wonderful sense of rhythm, {player}!
quest_offer_line: I'm trying to compose a new melody. Will you help me find the missing notes, {player}?
quest_progress_line: Do-re-mi... you've got a great ear for music, {player}!
quest_complete_line: What a beautiful song we've made! Thank you for the music, {player}.
